config.script:
# Open the supply fan controls side panel.
	
	system.perspective.openDock('controlSidePanel',params={'controlViewPath':'Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 2/Sm/Control Panels/Supply Fan Controls','compNumb':''})

# Open the gas heating side panel.
	
	system.perspective.openDock('controlSidePanel',params={'controlViewPath':'Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 2/Sm/Control Panels/Gas Heating Controls','compNumb':''})

# Open the upper heater controls side panel.
	
	system.perspective.openDock('controlSidePanel',params={'controlViewPath':'Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 2/Sm/Control Panels/Upper Heater Controls','compNumb':''})

# Open the lower heater controls side panel.
	
	system.perspective.openDock('controlSidePanel',params={'controlViewPath':'Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 2/Sm/Control Panels/Lower Heater Controls','compNumb':''})
